overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian robes walking through a desert landscape during golden hour, approaching a caravan of travelers, with an abrupt transition to night time at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert oasis edge with palm groves

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through desert sand toward the distant pyramid on the horizon

entered.detail: dense cluster of date palm trees lining the left side of the desert path
massive stone pyramid of Giza visible on the horizon against the sunset sky
rolling golden sand dunes extending into the distance on the right

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide desert landscape during golden hour, with palm trees lining the left side and the Great Pyramid visible far ahead. The sand shows vehicle tracks as the character moves steadily forward through the warm, orange-lit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert trade route with approaching caravan

events.description: caravan of travelers on camels and horses becomes visible approaching from the distance
character continues closing distance with the caravan, now clearly visible as riders on camels

agents.ego_description: approaching a group of travelers riding camels and horses through the desert

notable_agents.action: group of travelers riding camels and horses moving through the desert toward the character

entered.detail: group of travelers with camels and horses carrying goods along the desert track

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a caravan of travelers on camels appears ahead, moving in the opposite direction. The palm trees recede behind while the pyramid shifts to the right side of the frame. The character and caravan approach each other on the sandy track as the sun continues to set.

events.description: abrupt transition from golden hour daylight to night time with dark blue sky and reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through the desert in darkness toward a distant palm grove

entered.detail: dense cluster of palm trees visible ahead in the moonlight
dark blue night sky with clouds illuminated by moonlight

segments.scene_description: The scene abruptly shifts to night time with deep blue lighting. The caravan and pyramid are no longer visible, and the character continues walking toward a new cluster of palm trees ahead. The desert takes on a cool, dark atmosphere under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a vast desert that transforms from a warm golden hour glow into a cool, moonlit night. It begins with the character walking along a sandy track lined with palm trees, moving steadily toward the distant silhouette of the Great Pyramid under an orange sky. As the character advances, the palm trees recede and the pyramid shifts to the right, making way for a caravan of camel riders approaching from the opposite direction. The scene then abruptly shifts from the setting sun to a deep blue nocturnal atmosphere, where the caravan and pyramid vanish from view. Finally, the camera continues its forward trajectory through the dark desert toward a new cluster of palm trees under a starry night sky.
